schedule_metadata.agency_name: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the medical treatment specific to inpatient and outpatient animals at the Virginia-Maryland Regional College of Veterinary Medicine. Includes information on diagnostic workups, drugs administered, and all relevant medical and surgical procedures performed. These records are also maintained for research and clinical study purposes.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of diagnostic x-ray films used in the medical treatment of inpatient and outpatient animals at the Virginia-Maryland Regional College of Veterinary Medicine.
